name: Far East Peanut Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soy sauce and vinegar together and set aside.
2. Put the peanut butter in a bowl and mix in the sesame oil, blending thoroughly.
3. Add the chili paste and cayenne pepper to the peanut butter mixture, blending well.
4. Fold in the soy sauce blend into the peanut butter mixture, ensuring it's fully incorporated.
5. Blend in the mayonnaise until smooth.
6. Serve at room temperature.
Makes 1 1/4 cups of dipping sauce.
Suggested Dippers: Beef Satay, Shrimp, Crayfish, Sesame Crackers, Scallions, Cherry Tomatoes, Snow Peas
